techniques.name: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
techniques.description: Use five senses to ground in present moment.

entries.prompt: I notice you're feeling anxious. Let's try grounding together.
entries.validation: Anxiety is your mind trying to protect you.
entries.reframe: What if this worry is just a signal, not a command?
entries.micro_action: Name 5 things you can see right now.
entries.closure: You handled this moment with awareness.
